li.label: Mary Sue
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a surprising amount of experience and depth compared to most other people found on the Rim, as if they were a main character in an author's story...

li.label: AI personality
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a synthetic personality projected from a True AI core. [PAWN_pronoun] can ape any style on demand, but has no inner aesthetic — only pattern-matched mimicry. [PAWN_possessive] artwork is at best derivative.
